ssl_only_fix.trigger: Lead's stated concern is ONLY the SSL / 'Not Secure' warning

option_1.name: SSL Certificate Fix
option_1.scope: Install + configure SSL certificate, redirect HTTP to HTTPS, fix mixed content warnings

option_2.name: SSL + Speed Optimisation
option_2.scope: SSL fix + basic speed improvements (image compression, caching) + Google Search Console setup

option_3.name: SSL + Full Performance Audit + Fix
option_3.scope: SSL + speed + mobile + Google Business Profile audit and fixes + 30-day monitoring

ssl_plus_mobile.trigger: Lead has both SSL and mobile issues, or Day-7 new angle landed

option_1.name: SSL + Mobile Fix
option_1.scope: SSL certificate + mobile responsiveness fix (existing site framework)

option_2.name: SSL + Mobile + Speed Package
option_2.scope: SSL + mobile + basic speed + Google Business Profile setup

option_3.name: New Mobile-First Site
option_3.scope: New clean site: mobile-first, HTTPS, fast, with contact form / booking link. Migrate existing content.

no_website.trigger: Lead has no website at all (BAB signal — 4★+ 20+ reviews)

option_1.name: Single-Page Starter Site
option_1.scope: 1-page site: services, area covered, contact form, mobile-first, HTTPS. Live within 5 working days.

option_2.name: 3-Page Local Business Site
option_2.scope: Home + Services + Contact. Google Business Profile integration. Mobile-first, HTTPS, basic SEO.

option_3.name: Full Local Business Website
option_3.scope: 5+ pages, portfolio/gallery, booking/quote form, Google Business Profile + local SEO setup.

proposal_email_template.subject: [First name] — [business name]: three options to fix this
proposal_email_template.body:
Hi [First name],

Thanks for getting back to me — glad the timing works.

I've put together three options for [business name] depending on how far you'd like to go with it:

**Option 1 — [Name]:** [Scope] — £[price]. [Timeline].
**Option 2 — [Name]:** [Scope] — £[price]. [Timeline].
**Option 3 — [Name]:** [Scope] — £[price]. [Timeline].

Most clients in [town] start with Option [recommended] and add more later once they've seen the results.

Happy to jump on a quick call to talk through which makes most sense for you — what does your diary look like this week?

[Your name]
rules: Send within 24h of IMAP discovery time — NON-NEGOTIABLE (24/7 including weekends)
Fill all [brackets] from lead data and IMAP context
Option 2 is typically the recommended anchor price (middle option closes best)
Follow up with call within 48h if no reply to proposal email
